opinion.h4: HATHAWAY v. TEXAS. APPEAL FROM THE COUNTY COURT OF COOKE COUNTY, TEXAS. No. 532. Decided May 27, 1963.
opinion.p: Judgment reversed on representations of counsel for appellee.
Norman V. Suarez, Assistant Attorney General of Texas, for appellee.
The judgment is reversed on the representations of counsel for the appellee. West Point Wholesale Grocery Co. v. City of Opelika, Alabama, 354 U.S. 390.
opinion.h4: YALE TRANSPORT CORP. v. UNITED STATES, (1963)
opinion.p: YALE TRANSPORT CORP. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 936. Decided May 27, 1963.
Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger, Robert B. Hummel, Robert W. Ginnane, James Y. Piper and Fritz R. Kahn for the United States et al.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
